pattern: \[Win32App\]\[DetectionActionHandler\] Detection for policy with id: (?<id>{GUID}) resulted in action status: Success and detection state: (?<detection>Detected|NotDetected)
description: Captures the detection rule result after IME runs detection for an app. 'Detected' means the detection rule matched (app is installed), 'NotDetected' means it did not. Excludes [SimulatedDetectionActionHandler] which fires during applicability pre-checks.
